name: Stir-Fried Eggs with Tomatoes -Jidan Chao Xih
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized bowl, combine the eggs with the sesame oil and salt. Set aside.
2. Cut the tomatoes into quarters and then into eighths.
3. Crush the scallions using the flat of a cleaver or knife, then finely shred them.
4. Heat a wok or large saute pan until hot.
5. Add the peanut oil, salt, and shredded scallions to the pan. Stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add the chopped tomatoes and eggs to the pan. Continue cooking, stirring continually, until the eggs are set (about 5 minutes).
7. Quickly place the dish on a platter and serve immediately.
